item.title: Poland withdraws from treaty banning antipersonnel mines
item.description: Poland has officially left the Ottawa Convention, which bans the use of antipersonnel mines

item.title: Victims to settle case against Epstein's longtime attorney, accountant: Documents
item.description: The co-executors of Jeffrey Epstein's estate have agreed to settle a class action lawsuit filed against them by survivors of Epstein's abuse for at le...

item.title: Trump considering initial limited strike against Iran, source says
item.description: Trump says "bad things" will happen if deal isn’t reached.

item.title: WATCH: Sports car slams into school bus in Florida
item.description: No serious injuries were reported after a Jaguar crashed into the back of a school bus in Florida. Fortunately, there were no children on the bus at t...

item.title: WATCH: What’s next for former Prince Andrew after his arrest?
item.description: International attorney Ann Olivarius breaks down potential criminal pathways, jurisdictional hurdles and investigative next steps.
